features.fdd_name: Manage the user identities for the system
features.description: Handles authentication, JWT validation, sessions, RBAC, and audit logs.

features.fdd_name: Store the encrypted secrets of a user
features.description: Manages secure storage and injection of credentials using multiple ciphers SQLite.

features.fdd_name: Manage the lifecycle of a docker container
features.description: Interfaces with Docker API for image pulling, container execution, and monitoring.

features.fdd_name: Execute the wasm module of a plugin
features.description: Provides secure WebAssembly plugin execution via Extism with host functions.

features.fdd_name: Dispatch the system event to a subscriber
features.description: Core routing, WebSocket communication, and hook event bus implementation.

features.fdd_name: Configure the tools of an AI agent
features.description: Integrates LLMs with Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools and local execution workflows.

features.fdd_name: Manage the terminal profile of a system
features.description: Provides secure, profiled terminal sessions over PTY and WS.
